temporal_description:
The audio is filled with a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A gentle, somber melody, likely played on a piano or a soft synthesizer, creates a pensive and slightly sorrowful atmosphere. The music is calm and reflective, evoking a sense of quiet contemplation or sadness, without any dialogue or sound effects to interrupt its flow. The scene opens with a close-up, over-the-shoulder shot of a man in a black suit. He is looking intently at a computer monitor, his expression one of shock or alarm, with his mouth slightly agape. His hand rests on the desk in front of him. The setting appears to be a modern office, with the computer monitor displaying some graphics. In the background, a tiled wall and a small, out-of-focus plant are visible. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera remains steady, focusing on the man's reaction.

The camera cuts to a wide shot of a man in a black suit lying motionless on the ground, seemingly on top of a white car. In the background, three other men in business attire look on with concerned or shocked expressions. One man in a grey suit is crouched down, another stands in the middle ground, and a third is further in the background. The scene is set outdoors on a city street, with a modern building and a small evergreen tree visible. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left corner. The camera is static, capturing the aftermath of the man's fall and the reactions of the onlookers.
